ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album (if applicable) */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "love_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been loved */,
  "obsession_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been set as a current obsession */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was last updated */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's lyrics */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the album (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the artist was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the artist's information was last updated */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the album was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the album's information was last updated */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "track_order" TEXT /* Order of tracks in the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's music preferences (e.g., genres, artists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_obsessions" (
  "obsession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obsession entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the track was set as a current obsession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obsession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_obsessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_obsessions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time the track was purchased */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_purchases_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower entry */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
